name: Tinkerine Studios Ltd.
summary: Tinkerine Studios Ltd. designs, manufactures, and distributes 3D printers, software, and related online educational content in Canada, the United States, and the Asia Pacific region. It also provides Tinkerine Suite, a 3D slicing software; and PLA filaments, accessories, and PPEs. The company also sells its products online. Tinkerine Studios Ltd. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Delta, Canada.
